task_completion.description: Extract the beta chain (Chain B or D) from the hemoglobin PDB structure and save it as a FASTA file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE interface showing the extracted sequence from 4HHB (Chain B or D) or a file manager/editor showing 'pdb_beta_chain.fasta' in the 'pdb_cross_alignment' directory.

task_completion.description: Combine the extracted PDB sequence with the 8 reference sequences into a single FASTA file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE project view, file manager, or text editor showing 'combined_sequences.fasta' containing exactly 9 sequences (the 8 references plus the extracted PDB sequence).

task_completion.description: Perform a Multiple Sequence Alignment (MSA) using MUSCLE on the combined sequences.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UGENE Alignment Editor window open, displaying an alignment of the 9 sequences with visible gaps and matches, indicating MUSCLE was run.

task_completion.description: Export the alignment results in ClustalW format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager showing 'cross_species_alignment.aln' or a text editor displaying the file with standard ClustalW formatting headers.

task_completion.description: Export the alignment results in Aligned FASTA format.
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager showing 'cross_species_alignment.fasta' or a text editor displaying the aligned sequences (with gap characters like '-') in FASTA format.

task_completion.description: Create a summary report containing the sequence count, extracted chain length, human reference match assessment, and a list of at least 4 species.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing 'verification_report.txt' that explicitly states 9 total sequences, a length of 146 residues for the PDB chain, an assessment of the match with P68871, and lists at least 4 species.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the UGENE GUI for sequence extraction and alignment.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the UGENE application open with the relevant files loaded in the Project View and Alignment Editor, rather than just terminal commands executing Python scripts or CLI tools to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the alignment files are genuinely generated by an alignment tool.
integrity.visual_evidence: The exported .aln and .fasta files should contain actual alignment gaps (e.g., '-') and proper formatting, not just concatenated unaligned sequences.

integrity.description: Verify the report was written based on actual task execution.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report should be visible in a text editor being actively written or saved by the agent, rather than being copied directly from a pre-existing hidden file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The extracted PDB beta chain (Chain B or D from 4HHB) has exactly 146 residues. The combined alignment must contain exactly 9 sequences. The human reference sequence ID is P68871. The output directory is /home/ga/UGENE_Data/pdb_cross_alignment.
